ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metro_areas" (
  "metro_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "metro_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the metropolitan area is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the metropolitan area is located (e.g., Northeast, South, Midwest, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortgage_loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortgage loan application */,
  "metro_area_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the metro_areas table */,
  "loan_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the mortgage loan application */,
  "applicant_income" TEXT /* Income of the applicant */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., fixed-rate, adjustable-rate) */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan (e.g., 15 years, 30 years) */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lenders" (
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lender */,
  "lender_name" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the lender */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the lender is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the lender is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the lender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_originations" (
  "origination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan origination */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the mortgage_loan_applications table */,
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the lenders table */,
  "origination_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was originated */,
  "origination_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the loan origination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan performance record */,
  "origination_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the loan_originations table */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "outstanding_balance" TEXT /* Outstanding balance after the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "metro_area_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the metro_areas table */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend data */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Average interest rate for the metropolitan area */,
  "housing_market_index" TEXT /* Housing market index for the metropolitan area */,
  "unemployment_rate" TEXT /* Unemployment rate for the metropolitan area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
